constraints.name: requireRole
constraints.message: Role is required for an open shift

value.value: Only pending approvals can be approved
Only pending approvals can be rejected
Only pending timecards can be bulk-approved
Cannot update a deleted line item
Period end must be after period start
Only open tip pools can be allocated
Only allocated tip pools can be distributed
Distribution amount cannot exceed undistributed balance
Only allocated tip pools can be finalized
Only allocated or distributed tip pools can be closed
Only open actions can be acknowledged
Only open or in-progress actions can be escalated
Only open, in-progress, or escalated actions can be closed
Only pending milestones can be completed
Only pending milestones can be marked missed
Only draft reviews can be submitted
Only submitted reviews can be signed off
Only submitted reviews can be acknowledged
Only pending completions can be completed
Shift end must be after shift start
Only open shifts can be claimed
Employee ID is required to claim shift
Only open shifts can be cancelled
Only planned routes can be started
A driver must be assigned before starting the route
Only in-progress routes can be completed
Can only assign a driver to a planned route
Only pending stops can be marked arrived
Stop must be in arrived state before completing
Only pending stops can be reordered
Only pending refund attempts can be marked succeeded
Only pending refund attempts can be marked failed
Cannot update an inactive maintenance schedule
Cannot complete an inactive maintenance schedule
Next due date is required for recurrence

policies.name: ManagersCanManageTimecards
policies.message: Managers can approve or reject timecards

policies.name: ManagersCanManagePayroll
policies.message: Managers can manage payroll line items

policies.name: HRCanManageDisciplinary
policies.message: HR and managers can manage disciplinary actions

policies.name: HRCanManageOnboarding
policies.message: HR and managers can manage onboarding tasks

policies.name: StaffCanCompleteOnboarding
policies.message: All staff can complete their onboarding tasks

policies.name: StaffCanClaimOpenShifts
policies.message: All staff can claim open shifts

policies.name: ManagersCanManageOpenShifts
policies.message: Managers can create and cancel open shifts

policies.name: LogisticsCanManageRoutes
policies.message: Logistics managers can manage delivery routes
